generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor collecting raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting vehicle state information including speed, position, and other metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor sensor measuring motor performance data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo sensor measuring steering angle and torque"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and other metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor performance data including speed and torque"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering servo angle and torque measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedPathsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving paths computed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 software development kit for hardware acceleration and system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for internal software component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language used for implementing Digital Twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language used for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation component that serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking software component for processing LiDAR data into object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC system computation offloading including lead vehicle detection, speed computation, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service providing real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, with capabilities to save and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathsVisualization, SaveReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service handling ACC system functions including lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service allowing operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands through the UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance ProjectedPathsVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving paths"
]

    base:desc "Save and generate reports functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for ACC system"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed computation based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

    base:desc "Actuation commands for throttle, brake, or steering"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin representing the 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with sensors, actuators, and compute resources"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin component hosting the virtual model and processing services"
]

instance User : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for monitoring and control"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Entity for real-time data visualization"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Entity for system control inputs"
]

instance Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, User
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are translated via the Data Translation component and sent to the Actuation FE, which drives Motor and Steering Servo actuators. Commands are communicated using ROS2 for internal software components and Wi-Fi UDP for inter-entity transmission."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as mandated by hardware limitations. While safety-critical vehicular standards typically require stricter synchronization than 100 ms, the current implementation adheres to the 100 ms threshold due to existing hardware constraints."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages, each containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The three core entities—Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User—are organized to handle resource management, data processing, and user interaction respectively, with Physical Twin Entity specifically managing sensor data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication functionality on dedicated hardware."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data is stored on a device external to the vehicle. No additional details on hosting platforms, computational requirements, scalability, or reliability mechanisms are provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (parts 1-4), where Part 2 defines the reference architecture entities (Observable Manufacturing Element, Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, User Entity), and Functional Entities implement tasks such as data transformation using protocols like OPC Unified Architecture for interoperability."
]
